mapper.sql: id, original_invoice_no, merge_invoice_id, split_invoice_id, split_invoice_no, create_time, creator, update_time, updator, delflag, remark
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.invoice_split
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.invoice_split (id, original_invoice_no, merge_invoice_id, split_invoice_id, split_invoice_no, create_time, creator, update_time, updator, delflag, remark) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{originalInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mergeInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{splitInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{splitInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.invoice_split
id,
original_invoice_no,
merge_invoice_id,
split_invoice_id,
split_invoice_no,
create_time,
creator,
update_time,
updator,
delflag,
remark,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{originalInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mergeInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{splitInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{splitInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update dbo.invoice_split
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
original_invoice_no = #{record.originalInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
merge_invoice_id = #{record.mergeInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
split_invoice_id = #{record.splitInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
split_invoice_no = #{record.splitInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.invoice_split set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, original_invoice_no = #{record.originalInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, merge_invoice_id = #{record.mergeInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, split_invoice_id = #{record.splitInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, split_invoice_no = #{record.splitInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.invoice_split
original_invoice_no = #{originalInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
merge_invoice_id = #{mergeInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
split_invoice_id = #{splitInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
split_invoice_no = #{splitInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.invoice_split set original_invoice_no = #{originalInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, merge_invoice_id = #{mergeInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, split_invoice_id = #{splitInvoiceId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, split_invoice_no = #{splitInvoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
